star_1.text: This game is so addictive! Everything is great- until it's not. Coins disappear...but worse, the game will slow down and you can't toss the skeeballs. It has ruined several winning streaks and costs the loss of coins spent to play. It is infuriating for something that I play to distract from stress. PLEASE NOTE: Customer service is INCREDIBLE. However, if I contacted them every time the game lags or I have coins disappear, it would be literally daily. The frustration isn't worth it anymore.

9/23 updateMore ad glitches. I won 2 rounds in a row. one regular and a tag-team match. The ads glitched and I lost my points. Changing to 1 star. It glitches on the ads and you don't get your points when you win a round. It happens a lot. I won at least 8 games in a row and it glitched 2-3 times and it took over 300 points. Don't pay money for anything in this game. I'm glad I didn't. It would be better if you actually received the coins after sitting through the videos instead of it reloading.

This game is set up to where the players are AI! After reading the other reviews, I realized everything comes if you buy the extras. However, you are playing against an AI and they will let you win on occasion, to keep you buying extra coins. They have this game rigged! I followed the track of the balls with the same finger pressure, it would go in the opposite direction. The AI players are set up to let you win, in the beginning, them look out! Scam!

Loved this game at first, but after playing awhile, I was losing coins even though I won the match. After winning a match, there would be a "commercial break" which would result in the app closing and reopening. When app reopened, not only did I not get the reward, I saw that my bet was also gone. No way to win like that. I will not play again and am deleting the app.

This game is so messed up computer glitches, it picks who is going to win before the game is played, it takes a whole round away and they shoot 4 rounds and you get only three, the person keeps shooting when no balls are left usually 3 to 4 more times. You play up to 4 to 5 games and no wins, always pitted against someone high score never someone close to you. Game needs alot of work it sucks. You haven't fixed anything if I could give a zero I would worst game ever.

At first I gave it , 5 stars. That was when I was playing matches that were fair. then suddenly I was matched against people ( more likely bots) who would come in and obliterate me, making almost every ball in the 100 tube if not the 100 tube the 50 or 40. It's no longer fun when you get destroyed every game and your opponent has over 1000+ points by round 3 and you only have 150. All enjoyment has been lost, so I can no longer play this in good faith

microtransaction heavy and expensive. you're also obviously not playing against real people when they're sending back to back emojis while throwing. the time limit should be increased by at least 5-10 seconds because it's no one's fault balls take a while to travel if thrown high (you can't throw the next ball until the first goes in), and it is especially punishing in battle royale. all of this could be somewhat forgiven if the art style wasn't so... cheesy.

Great game UNTIL you realize it is rigged. You will see yourself getting big points even when it appears you missed the shot and vice versa. For the players that win double or more your points, perhaps they are paid subscribers or it is just a VERY rigged game. plain and simple. Game CHEATS big time !!

Fun game until I got ripped off by ads 5 times in just a few minutes. The double coin ads at the end of the games don't give a reward and neither do the free coin ads. The ads aren't short either. 90 second+ plus ads for zero rewards? Uninstalled.
used to be great until, either cheats or computer players started getting impossible scores in the battle Royale modes. I hate playing now, it's not fun when you get screwed every time.

the game's ai constantly cheats to win, letting them hit every special effect and boost while blocking the players shots even when they're lined up perfectly. as soon as I reach the time limit for my mistplay rewards, I'll be uninstalling.

Described as a competitive multiplayer or single player however it is forced multiplayer. Unfortunately not what I am looking for. Players should have the option to play alone or against Ai if they are looking for a relaxing, casual gameplay experience.
Gives you the true arcade experience by making you pay every time that you want to start a game. I don't think I've ever seen a mobile game this greedy.
great game but glitches too often resulting in loosing coins after watching ads even if u won game .
game keeps inviting player to accept gifts, and then tries to charge real money. bait and switch makes sane people angry!
Ran into a connection error. Thing is, my wifi is up and running just fine.
The game would be great...if there wasn't an ad after every single round.
Ads. I was starting to think this was a game without forced ads but sadly after a few games they started to force some ads on you. Forced ads = 1 star and an uninstall

Annoying you have to wait for the ball to fall into the hole before you can shoot again. Dumb that people can buy boosts from the store to drop a bunch of balls--more than once--into holes during ONE match. Uninstalling.

It's Alot Bull Funniest Game I've Played In Alongtime But Evertime I Go To Play In A Tournament's And Winng I Finally Made It To The Semi Finals Went To Commercial Break And It Kicked Me Out Again Really Piss's Me Off Other Then That It's Supper Fun But They Really Need To Fix The Bugs 🐛 😅 Because It's Really An Awesome Game

star_2.text: I like the game, it's very fun to play. My problem is the amount of coins everything costs, compared to what you earn. After my matches, it asks if I want to double what I earned, but it's not doubling it. It's only adding 10 coins to what I earned. And if you watch a video it's only 10 coins. For characters to use and be able to play the least amount is 20 coins and that is only good for one game. It also has other games or scratch tickets, but those cost a ridiculous amount of real money!!

I would really appreciate it if y'all would pair the matches more even. I'm a beginner and have not had 1 opponent under level 60. And I'm level 5!!!! It's really discouraging and makes me not want to play even though I like the game alot. I'm no poor sport and won't quit just would have way more fun if I wasn't getting absolutely dessimated every game that's all. Thanks it's a fun game and that's the only thing I can think to make it better.

was really into this game at first. the second I started getting ahead and winning things changed. I shoot pretty much the same all the time, next thing I know every single one was going in and out, or feel weighted down out of nowhere, they would purposely run down the clock.So you don't have time to shoot all of your balls too. also , they put you up against people that are way way way ahead of you , level and character, that you couldn't possibly win against. scammy

it was fun until around 30 trophies I realized the opponent was given 4 to 5 Magic Ready in one game and I had zero, maybe 1 in 2 games. On the Blitz every other ball ended up with constant extra balls for the opponent and the negative numbers didn't tally as a negative for the opponent, only myself. looks like winning is no longer an option

what I don't appreciate about this version is "glitch convenience," meaning glitches are subtle and occur in favor of "opponent," especially in all Battle Royal tournaments. like, I have a technical shot for the 100s that conveniently becomes glitchie. also, the 'glitches' are "conveniently" blamed on our internet connection.

when the ads play it will kick u out and restart app so u lose ur winnings and trophies . I love the game just don't like being cheated out of my coins I won. not only do u not recieve what u win u lose out on the amount of coins u pay to use which ever character u played with. it started out as super fun but has turned into super frustrating. then they want u to pay 14.99 to play no ads. I don't understand y I should have to pay anything to get rid of ads because the glitch in the game robs me
It's great until you actually have to start paying for games and then you continually lose. And that's just horrible.

I love this game!! but every time I'm playing a game or tournament it loses my progress and completely makes me restart the game. Losing all my coins plus the ones I won in tournaments. I'm so close to deleting! I need this fixed!
The freezing on this game is almost as insane as the in-game cheating. Every day, I lose coins & my winnings because a commercial won't play.
You have got to fix the tournament mode, the ads freeze the game on the win screen. I have lost 450 in entry fees and 450 in win money. This is ridiculous!!!!!!!

every time I play a tournament they play an ad after the first win and then it kicks me out and I lose all my coins!! ready to uninstall. hundreds of coins lost because of this. wouldn't be so bad if the return of coins was better. I did update game and played 2 tournaments and still crashed after the first ad so just lost another 200 coins. disappointing because I do like playing. but clearly can't.

You can only go up one tier if you finish in the top 3. It looks like you get demoted after that. In order to win you need good characters. It's fun but over time it gets expensive. The other Issue is that there's no interaction with other players. The fan page is not helpful at all.

the app is really fun, however when I play the tournament 3 times in a row I didn't get my coins because after the commercial it re booted the game, as if I hadn't played the tournament. very frustrated!!! fix this and I'll give 5 stars

every time there's a commercial break, it pulls me out of the mega tournament and lose my place after a Temu commercial it never gets me back! frustrating to say the least. it makes me not want to play with real $!!

I think it's really unfair that you have the big scorers playing the small ones. you put them on there in pairs of 4 at a time. so you should keep each 4 playing against the ones they were placed with. like the owl can't play against the unicorn and win, there's no way. so it's not fair to have them play again each other. can you not fix it till the four play again each other and no others? it's not fair and you know when you see your the owl well your opponent is the unicorn your not winning.

Fun for awhile then stupid. You only win 10 coins per match, plus you win back your "buy in" coins. But once you get further in the game, it takes hundreds of coins to buy in, so if you lose the match, you don't have coins to play more unless you spend real money! Oh, unless you want to watch 30 second ads for 10 coins! I refuse! Will be deleting game! On the higher levels, you should be able to win more coins.

GameStops when you are winning 😡. I can't remember the last time I posted that what day it was but now it's doing it again and it screwed me out of winning many championships in the last 2 days this is 3/3/2025 game works for a little while and screwed up again when you do tournaments or the blitz big money games is when it happens and I'm fed up I'll see if you can fix it when I go to get my money and my trophies is when it happens

Well you make it to a certain rank. And then the computer which that's what you're playing not actual people. It won't let you win on the 20 point games only a couple of times. This game really sucks now that I have gotten so far. I rank it a 2 star game. I don't even try and the commuter still beats my socks off. For example, 300 me and 2500 computer. I'd rather go and start all over, if this is the way it gets. Just use my points and delete the game. Google Play you do something.

This game was a great fun game until they added the new characters that made it almost impossible to play against them if you use original characters. I just feel that certain characters should not be able to verse others. It made the game go from enjoyable to make me contemplate deleting it altogether.

used to be fun. I have almost 800 trophies but I've not won much lately cause the game always cheats for my opponent. they get all kinds of extra help..extra throws...etc. Not once have I ever received extra help. So it's very hard to win any games. It's pretty irritating...you day there's no help that it's strictly skill That's a lie. my opponents get truck loads of balls dropped etc...when it's their turns ...so why do my opponents get help but I've never gotten help once...it's bull

star_3.text: This is a good game. The UI feels dated, but the overall game structure is engaging. I would give this a 4 or 5, but you have to pay for every power-up or item that you, "win." It's a lot of nickle and diming and the power-ups are not inexpensive. I have paid for coins, which are priced reasonably, but I would suggest giving players the power-ups they have earned instead of making them pay for them.

it is a fun game. I understand there's an option to pay for an ad free version. not every one can do that. I personally don't mind the ads. My problem with the ads popping up, they pop up in a tournament, in the middle of your games. or right after before getting your post if you win. I lose everything. the ads always take me to the google store. which automatically logs me out of the game. losing the coins I spent too play a game.

I enjoy the game. It's been a great way to pass time. Don't even mind the ads the designers have to make money. The couple of issues is when I lose several tokens due to the game freezing up along with trophies that I would have won. The other issue is when I beat opponents by 1000 and sometimes more than 2000 points, and I only win 2 trophies. Lastly is if I don't place in the top, I drop ranking. If we earn it once we should be able to keep it. I am now losing tokens playing the tournaments.

Good graphics. Fun gameplay but you have to spend money on a majority of the stuff and there are a ton of ads that get pretty annoying. It's a great game but unless you are willing to spend 20 bucks on items and to make it ad free it gets pretty unbearable quicker than I would like. It's a shame because if it wasn't so dominated by spending money it would be almost a perfect mobile game

I really enjoy this game ads aren't too terrible but, this game means towards greedy more than not. earning coins sucks. we should get a lot more for leveling up and winning matches. can't add friends with otherplayers, only with people you invite. I may just find another game. There's a ridiculous amount of in game buying and really dont earn or win many benefits

love the game, but having issues when I'm in a tournament and it goes to commercial break, the game will shut off in the middle of my tournament sending me to my home screen. this is aggravating because I'll be winning the tournaments and when this happens it cost me my game, my player/ pawn, and my time. JS plz fix this issue. it's happening more and more daily.

I was really enjoying this game, but the newest update makes it stop playing any music or podcasts I have going in the background. And I'm pretty much always listening to something in the background if I'm playing. So... will watch for an update I guess before I play again
the ad I saw this on said you could make money play this bug so far I don't see that anywhere in the game. but I do love skee ball.
Edit: Deleting. Tired of winning multiple times and not getting ANY of the coins. Don't waste your time downloading this.
there is a challenge to play with friends, don't know how to do, don't know how to earn more coins without spending what I have. otherwise I enjoy playing and it is very addictive

I truly enjoy this game. The only thing I HATE is the advertisements. Fortunately, they have the option to pay to remove ads. But, I've been trying to buy it for two weeks now and it just loads.... it never stops loading, so I'm unable to get it. I'm so frustrated because I want to play, but not with those long terrible ads. I don't even know the price for removing the ads, because I've never gotten further from loading page. If someone has any advice for me I'd appreciate it.
it has been awesome until today. it has started freezing right after a win and the last time it took 420 coins from me that I played hard to get
would be an awesome game. if it didn't take you coins each time you win. goes to ad then glitches everyone taken all you coins from win and ante
having fun playing but just recently got game have not looked into the real cash payout so don't know how well that works

Cool game, just too slow, navigating the UI is slow, the balls travel too slow, I actually have to put a lot of effort into rolling the balls... and it would be cool if I didn't have to wait for each ball to first drop before I can throw the next... also what makes the game slow, however great game. Very well put together.

every time lately when I win and accumulate points claim them and then it goes back to main screen and I'll lose all my points . so you have to start all back over . not happy about that but the game is fun

i absolutely love this game , started it on my other tablet I had earned a bunch of coins and purchased several emojis/emotes,balls and messages/texts . then I dropped my tablet now I have a ehh tablet that isn't as great as my other one , buuuuuut all my earnings, wins ECT are gone and now I gotta start from scratch and it's a lil less fun as it was when I first discovered this game if I was able to save my game progress so I could log in & pick up where I last was then I would of gave 5⭐!!

I'm having problems after I win. the game freezes by other players and I don't know how to stop it. I've lost many games with lizards n alligator golden that I won and don't get the coins earned. and how do you report someone cheating or when you lose you're men that cost so much to buy? I'm frustrated. I love the game but the memes make you and who you're playing lose coins. That's how they're cheating. I don't think I will play again, it's a shame.

I've only just begun playing the game but I 💗 this game at the arcades when I was a kid. Skee-ball was usually the only one that I would play when I was there,so I'm hoping 🫣 it's going to give me same feeling as when I played it back then🎉🤯🥳😁..lots of Good times🤪 and memories...We shall see if it measures up to the real thing!!! **to be continued**☺️🧐

I love this game but it cost too much to play and the boost that you have you dont even get to keep after you' ve won a game..u have to pay coins that u have won to play the booster again! That sucks and it takes to long to gather coins ...It doesn't even seem like your winning double coins just double trophies and getting trophies doesn't win you coins!! The coin packs are to expensive for the little coins you have in them ...and i love to pay for a game if its affordable and I like playing it

star_4.text: Very fun game but some misleading things. You get push notifications that a player has challenged you to a match, but they are fake. There is no challenge function in the game. Also, the game freezes up sometimes mid-match, but you lose your coins instead of a getting a reset. The double reward option by watching an ad is false. It doesn't ever double the reward. As far as I can tell there's no way to figure out your weekly ranking from the past week.

Like the lot of games here, there are multitudes and a plethora of commercials. I like to play the game otherwise and do like it. They could minimize the insane amounts of repetitive commercials that try to sucker you into things you don't need to pay money for. Everything is always about money, what a pathetic way of living and breathing (always greedy and always wanting more from people). Never satisfied with anything.

I like the game, but for some reason on my android, the commercials will either not let me go back or locks me up , or have to reboot and I lose points.3 times lock up. I'll keep updating. had 3 star down graded to 2 star have not received acknowledgement of the issue yet. [THEY ARE LOOKING INTO IT. I'LL GIVE YOU AN UPDATE AS SOON AS IT'S BETTER.]<---

Fun, but all of the opponents are bots. So if you develop any kind of skill you will easily win. Not sure if there is much of a player base to make it truly competitive. Ads are nice and short, and relatively infrequent. I appreciate that!

I love this game, the only problem I have with it,well two problems actually...first is after throwing a ball, it takes way too much time to get back in the ball catcher so I can throw another ball. The other issue is whenever I choose to play blitz mode computer selects same character as I do

game has been fun for the last 8 months, almost a year, until now. it don't matter which character I use, I get matched with a much higher opponent. and if i don't, and I win, the ad freezes, or the game must don't pay me my coins. it's getting very old. and I'm thinking about deleting this game now.

I love the game although I think the game needs to be updated a little bit Meaning that when your in a game and you win but it goes on a ad you end up not receiving the coins you have won please fix Thank You
Not bad at all.. The characters are directed more towards children than adults so that's not appealing, however the game itself is pretty good.. relaxing..
pretty fun and accurate as far as the targets are and throwing...maybe a few less ads but theyre not too overwhelming fir the game play

like this game, it's fun, except all of my past game play vanished. I have been playing over a year so I was at a good level. the support is t the greatest, but I was a le to send an email, still waiting for a reply on how to recover my past account
fun, easy don't really care for the ads 😉
fun engaging video game, it just reminds me of playing this at Chucky Cheese when I was a youngster.
Just started. Not sure yet. I can't figure out how to get it to say something else. I also can't figure out how to activate it either.
Very fun game. Relaxing but could use less ads.
love the game but should be able to play all levels without trophy's
too many ads but still a fun game.
so I just started playing, but it's really fun so far. I'm not 100 percent sure how I'm supposed to be playing but I'm just kinda winging it
Like the game but dont play long cuz the ads
id give 5 stars if i didn't have to pay to remove ads.
fun but too easy opponets can,t shoot well

star_5.text: 2nd UPDATE (Because I'm so addicted to this game!) Awesome game, endless fun, exceptional customer service, minimal ads!! TRY IT!! UPDATED: I LOVE this game! Unfortunately, I originally gave it only 2 stars, because of certain aspects that inhibited gameplay, but I have to say, the support team addressed these issues almost immediately. One more issue for them to fix & I'll absolutely re-update my review to 5 stars, because at that point, this version of the game will be the best one out there!

this is actually fun... figuring out how to "roll" these balls is fun (the pattern differs on another device). They allow "practice", which helps. Chats aren't bothersome, cuz opponent can only choose pre-worded emojis, which gets funny ... Not an excessive amount of ad watching - u pick what u watch - or don't. I haven't had to buy anything. This is different from most online games...

I'm loving this game. I love the graphics. I haven't quite got the hang of the magic yet, but it's old school ski ball. I love the smiley faces. I wish you could communicate better with other players but all in all good fun. not sure how you win money but it says you can all right. I'll be playing this one for a long time
very fun game. I wish there was an option to play a single mode by yourself when you first start that way you can practice it a little more but it's fun anyway... 😊

very fun. love having someone to play against and I absolutely love the practice mode, now that's very cool. also the "add breaks" are good cause sometimes the pressure of the game gives me anxiety so the "add break" is necessary in this game.

When your're first starting off they pair you with other players that have more advanced features like the dumptruck full of balls after making a 100 Slot mutliple times inna row ln which it makes it damn near impossible for anyone to win a match. Yet I still keep playing thinking I'm actually going to win a match. Ive won 27 matches out of almost at least 50+ matches They should pair you with other people in your category to smooth out who plays who. They should pair w/peeps in your category
It reminds me of younger years and arcades and the freedom of playing and just having fun.
I love this Game. Is this an updated version of ski ball 3D? That game was so awsome. An this is kinda similar, but is very different. I enjoy so far.
fun can be aggravating when you have to play someone with 80 trophies and you only have 6. But it is so much fun.
i been playing skee ball for a long time in arcade games and its very exciting. Glad that i found this app.
this is 1 of my childhoods favorite games at the arcade. I'm excited to be able to play from home. even if it is on a phone
I like skeeball at fairs so I'm glad there's one on phone. Fun to play.
I enjoyed the game very much. It helps me keep my mind off reality for while.
This is a awesome and fun game. i really enjoy playing it and recommend it for all ages.
Addicting!!! Can't stop playing it since I downloaded it.

so far the game has been really good. not alot of ads u have to watch. but the minute they make me watch a ad I will delate this game. other then that this game is actually more fun to play then alot of other ones. if u like skeetball as a kid this game is one to play.
reason I'm winning so many games I see mental Images in the subconscious mind seeing the balls go in . In my mind thanks. *****

This is the best Skeetball game that I have ever played. I just wish I could log in thru Facebook. I really don't understand the cards you can pick from at the start of the game. Is there any place that I can find out what each card does ? Please let me know. Thank you Richard A Green
it's challenging, fast paced and keeps you playing a lot of fun.
So very fun to play and challenging to play against other players.
